'''Raphael Sbarge''' is an actor, voice actor, director and producer. He has appeared in a number of films and provided the voicing for several ''[[Star Wars]]'' video games.

He voices [[Dak Ralter/Legends|Dak Ralter]] in [[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron (video game)|''Star Wars: Rogue Squadron'']], [[Dellis Tantor]] in ''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]'', [[Scorch/Legends|Scorch]] in ''[[Star Wars: Republic Commando]]'' and [[Carth Onasi]] in ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' and ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''.

{{Bio-stub}}
